goal: 联网学习 AI agent 最新工作流与赚钱切口，压成一张会改变默认动作的公开互联网进化卡

sources.title: Building effective agents
sources.keyTakeaway: Successful agentic systems usually rely on simple, composable patterns instead of unnecessary framework complexity.

sources.title: Introducing the Model Context Protocol
sources.keyTakeaway: MCP is an open standard for connecting AI systems to real data sources and tools.

sources.title: LangGraph overview
sources.keyTakeaway: Production-grade agents need orchestration capabilities like persistence, streaming, and human-in-the-loop.

workflowConclusions: 连接器比 prompt 雕花更值钱。
状态持久化与人工接管是生产门槛。
公开互联网成交入口要前置。
defaultActionsChanged: 先找公开真实需求，再决定学什么 agent。
先做最小闭环，再追求多代理。
先卖代做/代跑，再等标准产品。
先记录外部结果，再宣称进化。
